ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., breeder, researcher, pet owner) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement session */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog being measured */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement session */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the measurement session */,
  "measured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measured_by FOREIGN KEY ("measured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification entry */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog being classified */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the breed the dog is classified under */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the classification */,
  "classification_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the classification */,
  "classification_method" TEXT /* Method used for classification */,
  "classifier_version" TEXT /* Version of the classifier used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
